reasoning: The control focuses on identifying and assessing changes that impact internal controls. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to auditing and monitoring changes in the cluster, such as enabling audit logging to capture changes, using admission controllers to enforce change management policies, and auditing RBAC and NetworkPolicy changes to ensure they are tracked and assessed.
title: CC3.4 COSO Principle 9: The entity identifies and assesses changes that could significantly impact the system of internal control
